description:
Allow linking tasks as blockers or dependents with visual indicators. Show gantt-like dependency chains so teams know what to prioritize.

**Rationale:** Prevents wasted work on blocked tasks. Essential for project planning, especially in software development workflows.
title: Task Dependency Mapping
